tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Must Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Must Have का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He must have worked very hard. He must have been tired. They must have made a mistake. She must have told the truth. We must have been late.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Must Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Must Have का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He must have read this book. She must have been very happy. They must have spent a lot of money. He must have called me. She must have gone there.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "हमने जरूर सही रास्ता चुना होगा।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We must have chosen the right path.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "She musts have told the truth."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She must have told the truth.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Must Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Must Have का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They must have succeeded. He must have talked to me. She must have been sad. They must have seen this.
